params.TgtPrompt: Select any number of target nonland permanents you control
params.SpellDescription: Any number of target nonland permanents you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until your next turn.)

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select any number of target nonland permanents you control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Any number of target nonland permanents you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until your next turn.)
